---
title: "More resources"
listing:
  - id: positron-ai
    contents:
      - positron-ai-assistant.qmd
      - assignment-quality-criteria.qmd
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: false
    categories: false
  - id: reproducible-workflows
    contents:
      - quarto-documentation.qmd
      - github-collaboration.qmd
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: false
    categories: false
  - id: ml-workflows
    contents:
      - ml-data-preparation-for-python.qmd
      - storing-and-sharing-workflows.qmd
      - hf_model_sharing_example.qmd
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: false
    categories: false
---

Guides and references that support the lectures and assignments, grouped by topic. Click any card to open the full write-up.

## Positron & AI

:::{#positron-ai}
:::

## Reproducible workflows

:::{#reproducible-workflows}
:::

## Machine-learning workflows

:::{#ml-workflows}
:::
